summary: Completed testing of resizable panels feature. Left and right panels have functional resize handles with hover effects. Resize functionality works for increasing width, but minimum width constraint has issues on left panel.

ui_bugs.issue: Minimum width constraint not working properly - panel stays at maximum width when dragging to reduce size
ui_bugs.details: When dragging left to reduce width, panel remains at 400px instead of reducing to minimum 200px

passed_tests: Left panel (Layer Palette) visible with resize handle on right edge
Right panel (Properties Panel) visible with resize handle on left edge
Resize handles have proper hover effects (purple highlight)
Left panel can be resized to increase width (256px → 347px → 400px)
Right panel can be resized to increase width (320px → 427px)
Maximum width constraint working for left panel (400px achieved)
Resize handles are visually distinct and properly positioned
Panels maintain proper styling during resize operations
success_percentage: frontend: 75% (7/8 core features working, 1 constraint issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minimum width constraint in ResizablePanel component - when dragging to reduce width, the panel should properly decrease to minimum width instead of staying at maximum width
